debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l1 l2 : List α
idx1 idx2 : ℕ
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
hidx2 : idx2 < l2.length
heq : l1[idx1] = l2[idx2]
hperm : l1.Perm l2
⊢ (l1.eraseIdx idx1).Perm (l2.eraseIdx idx2)

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa using hperm.countp_eq (fun x => x = l1[idx1])
      have hcount' : (l1.eraseIdx idx1).countp (fun x => x = l1[idx1])
          = (l2.eraseIdx idx2).countp (fun x => x = l1[idx1]) := by
        have h1 :
            (l1.eraseIdx idx1).countp (fun x => x = l1[idx1])
              = l1.countp (fun x => x = l1[idx1]) - 1 := by
          simpa [List.eraseIdx, List.countp_erase, hin1]
        have h2 :
            (l2.eraseIdx idx2).countp (fun x => x = l1[idx1])
              = l2.countp (fun x => x = l1[idx1]) - 1 := by
          have : l1[idx1] ∈ l2 := hmem
          simpa [List.eraseIdx, List.countp_erase, this, heq] using (rfl : True = True)
        simpa [h1, h2, hcount]
      exact List.Perm.eraseIdx_of_getElem_eq hidx1 hidx2 heq hperm
